category.scope_note: Grid-tied photovoltaic inverter comparison. Energy storage inverter and hybrid storage functions are excluded.

labels.zh: 并网光伏逆变器（不含储能）
labels.zht: 併網光伏逆變器（不含儲能）

title.en: China-to-UK Solar Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入英国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入英國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China grid-tied PV inverter documentation against UKCA product compliance and ENA G98/G99 grid-connection expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国并网光伏逆变器文件与英国 UKCA 产品合规及 ENA G98/G99 并网要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國併網光伏逆變器文件與英國 UKCA 產品合規及 ENA G98/G99 併網要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, approved-body assessment, DNO approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current UK product-safety, EMC, UKCA, ENA, and DNO procedures with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、英国认可机构评审、DNO 批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行英国产品安全、EMC、UKCA、ENA 及 DNO 程序。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、英國認可機構評審、DNO 批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行英國產品安全、EMC、UKCA、ENA 及 DNO 程序。

answer_first.en: UKCA marking and ENA G98/G99 type-test registration are required for UK market and grid access; EU CE marking alone is not accepted.
answer_first.zh: 进入英国市场及并网通常需要 UKCA 标志和 ENA G98/G99 型式测试登记；仅有欧盟 CE 标志不被接受。
answer_first.zht: 進入英國市場及併網通常需要 UKCA 標誌和 ENA G98/G99 型式測試登記；僅有歐盟 CE 標誌不被接受。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, approved body, ENA, DNO, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
